positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u34,negated_conjecture,
    work_remotely_home(james)).

cnf(u38,negated_conjecture,
    lunch_at_home(james)).

cnf(u42,negated_conjecture,
    in_other_countries(james)).

cnf(u45,negated_conjecture,
    ~manager(james)).

cnf(u53,axiom,
    ~appear_company_today(james)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~lunch_at_home(X0) | work_remotely_home(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~manager(X0) | ~work_remotely_home(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~in_other_countries(X0) | work_remotely_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define lunch_in_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define schedule_meeting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define go_to_building_today(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:

% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~manager(james)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~appear_company_today(james)).

% SZS output end Saturation.

for all inputs,

% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
